title: Fix Google Yellow WCAG failure: #FBBC05 → passing color
description: Google Yellow #FBBC05 on white has a contrast ratio of 1.71:1 — fails WCAG AA for both normal and large text. This is P1 because it blocks the wcagContrast gate which is required for Type 2 launches. Options: (1) #F9AB00 gives 3.12:1 (passes AA large text), (2) use a heavier font weight to qualify as large text, (3) accept the failure for colored decorative use only and add a WCAG exemption note. Decision needed before the gate can flip. Update google.tokens.json and regenerate.
